rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; total_hits>=1 -> FAIL
candidate_summary: SONGLINE-MEM: ordered-sequence external memory with spatial-semantic waypoint anchors; traversal-based retrieval API (forward+backward); not random-access key-value.

independent_results.title: Episodic Memory Missing Piece Long-Term LLM Agents (2025/02)
independent_results.reason: Episodic memory stores SEQUENCE OF EVENTS with temporal contexts LINKED by temporal order and causal chains — direct mechanistic twin of ordered-sequence external memory with traversal-style access. Crosses sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7.

independent_results.title: Zep Temporal Knowledge Graph Agent Memory (2025/01)
independent_results.reason: Bi-temporal timeline with events grouped into ordered episodes with validity windows — sequence-preserving traversal-ready memory architecture. Crosses sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7.

independent_results.title: Survey Security Long-Term Memory LLM Agents (2026/04)
independent_results.reason: Survey of long-term agent memory architectures including sequential/episodic; borderline crosses sem>=0.7.

independent_results.title: Episodic Memory for AI Agents
independent_results.reason: Episodic memory layer with explicit temporal sequencing — direct functional twin of sequential traversal memory. Crosses sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7.

independent_results.title: LLM Hierarchical Memory Smarter Agents
independent_results.reason: Hierarchical memory organization differs from ordered-sequence traversal as the primary structure; below 0.7 thresholds.

independent_results.title: LoCoMo Very Long-Term Conversational Memory Eval
independent_results.reason: Evaluation benchmark for long-term conversational memory, not a sequential traversal architecture; below thresholds.

independent_results.title: Survey Memory Mechanism LLM Agents (ACM TOIS)
independent_results.reason: Comprehensive memory-mechanism survey covers sequential/episodic primitives directly relevant to SONGLINE-MEM; borderline crosses both thresholds.

independent_results.title: G-Memory Hierarchical Memory Multi-Agent (NeurIPS 2025)
independent_results.reason: 3-tier graph hierarchy explicitly includes sequential memory units (insight/query/interaction trajectories) — sequence-preserving traversable layer. Crosses sem>=0.7 and func>=0.7.

verdict_sentence: FAIL: SONGLINE-MEM's ordered-sequence/traversal memory mechanism is already instantiated by prior episodic/temporal memory architectures for LLM agents (e.g., the 2025 Episodic Memory paper, Zep's temporal knowledge graph, and atlan's episodic memory layer), yielding 6 hits >= 1.
